mapper.sql: select id, order_no, store_name, store_short_name, store_type, expected_opening_date, region_name, region_leader, general_manager, store_manager_name, province, city, district, address_detail, site_area, site_mode, planned_staff_count, initial_investment_amount, estimated_monthly_revenue, opening_reason, remark, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sys_store_opening
mapper.select:
where del_flag = '0'
and order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and store_name like concat('%', #{storeName}, '%')
and region_name like concat('%', #{regionName}, '%')
and workflow_status = #{workflowStatus}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_store_opening( order_no, store_name, store_short_name, store_type, expected_opening_date, region_name, region_leader, general_manager, store_manager_name, province, city, district, address_detail, site_area, site_mode, planned_staff_count, initial_investment_amount, estimated_monthly_revenue, opening_reason, remark, process_instance_id, process_definition_key, workflow_status, current_task_name, submitter, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{storeName}, #{storeShortName}, #{storeType}, #{expectedOpeningDate}, #{regionName}, #{regionLeader}, #{generalManager}, #{storeManagerName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{addressDetail}, #{siteArea}, #{siteMode}, #{plannedStaffCount}, #{initialInvestmentAmount}, #{estimatedMonthlyRevenue}, #{openingReason}, #{remark}, #{processInstanceId}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{workflowStatus}, #{currentTaskName}, #{submitter}, #{submitTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update sys_store_opening
store_name = #{storeName}, store_short_name = #{storeShortName}, store_type = #{storeType}, expected_opening_date = #{expectedOpeningDate}, region_name = #{regionName}, region_leader = #{regionLeader}, general_manager = #{generalManager}, store_manager_name = #{storeManagerName}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, site_area = #{siteArea}, site_mode = #{siteMode}, planned_staff_count = #{plannedStaffCount}, initial_investment_amount = #{initialInvestmentAmount}, estimated_monthly_revenue = #{estimatedMonthlyRevenue}, opening_reason = #{openingReason}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update sys_store_opening set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
